text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I have something to report.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I took a physical fitness test during today's gym
class, and I found that my parameters have
increased by 1.3 times on average compared with
last year.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Of particular note is my shuttle run result, which
has improved by 150%.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In other words, your training has been of great
statistical significance to my growth.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It is for this reason that I am giving you this
mundane object to show my appreciation.

With that, she hands me some special carrot juice.
I've heard it's popular among the students.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I decided on this after researching the traditional
etiquette for showing gratitude. It is only a small
gift.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I look forward to our continued collaboration.

All "small gifts" aside, our training seems to be
going well!
